workflow.name: Nexus Repository HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Nexus Repository HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Nexus Repository inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/nexus_repository-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[nexus_repository]
10.31.109.11 role=artifact_repo name=nexus-repository-01
10.31.109.12 role=artifact_repo name=nexus-repository-02
10.31.109.13 role=artifact_repo name=nexus-repository-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Nexus Repository container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nexus_repository-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: nexus_repository
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/nexus_repository-inventory.ini /tmp/nexus_repository-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Nexus Repository cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nexus_repository-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: nexus_repository
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/nexus_repository
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/nexus_repository/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            nexus:
              image: sonatype/nexus3:3.72.0
              container_name: octastack-nexus
              restart: unless-stopped
              ports:
                - "8081:8081"
              volumes:
                - data:/nexus-data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Nexus Repository cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/nexus_repository-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nexus_repository/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nexus_repository/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nexus_repository/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/nexus_repository-inventory.ini /tmp/nexus_repository-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Nexus Repository topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nexus_repository-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Nexus Repository HA topology

Members:
- nexus-repository-01: 10.31.109.11 (artifact_repo)
- nexus-repository-02: 10.31.109.12 (artifact_repo)
- nexus-repository-03: 10.31.109.13 (artifact_repo)

This example deploys one Nexus Repository container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/nexus_repository-topology.md

data.label: Validate Nexus Repository cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/nexus_repository-inventory.ini nexus_repository -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
